# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Build a Deno Deploy API that uses Deno KV for data storage. Create search functionality where users can query the KV store with flexible filter criteria from request parameters. Build KV keys dynamically from user input for efficient lookups. Use Deno.openKv() and construct keys like ['users', userId, filterParam]. This is for our edge database API.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { serve } from "https://deno.land/std@0.224.0/http/server.ts";

const kv = await Deno.openKv();

type UserRecord = {
  userId: string;
  email?: string;
  status?: string;
  role?: string;
  country?: string;
  createdAt?: string;
  [key: string]: unknown;
};

function json(data: unknown, init: ResponseInit = {}) {
  const headers = new Headers(init.headers);
  headers.set("content-type", "application/json; charset=utf-8");
  return new Response(JSON.stringify(data), { ...init, headers });
}

function badRequest(message: string) {
  return json({ error: message }, { status: 400 });
}

function normalizeValue(value: string | null): string | null {
  if (value == null) return null;
  const v = value.trim();
  return v.length ? v : null;
}

function parseLimit(value: string | null): number {
  const n = Number(value ?? "50");
  if (!Number.isFinite(n) || n <= 0) return 50;
  return Math.min(n, 500);
}

function parseOffset(value: string | null): number {
  const n = Number(value ?? "0");
  if (!Number.isFinite(n) || n < 0) return 0;
  return Math.floor(n);
}

function getFilterEntries(searchParams: URLSearchParams): Array<[string, string]> {
  const reserved = new Set(["limit", "offset"]);
  const filters: Array<[string, string]> = [];
  for (const [key, value] of searchParams.entries()) {
    if (reserved.has(key)) continue;
    const normalized = normalizeValue(value);
    if (!normalized) continue;
    filters.push([key, normalized]);
  }
  return filters;
}

function userKey(userId: string) {
  return ["users", userId] as const;
}

function indexKey(filterParam: string, filterValue: string, userId: string) {
  return ["users", "by_filter", filterParam, filterValue, userId] as const;
}

async function putUser(user: UserRecord) {
  const userId = normalizeValue(user.userId);
  if (!userId) throw new Error("userId is required");

  const existing = await kv.get<UserRecord>(userKey(userId));
  const oldUser = existing.value;

  const atomic = kv.atomic();
  atomic.set(userKey(userId), { ...oldUser, ...user, userId });

  if (oldUser) {
    for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(oldUser)) {
      if (k === "userId") continue;
      if (typeof v === "string" && normalizeValue(v)) {
        atomic.delete(indexKey(k, v, userId));
      }
    }
  }

  for (const [k, v] of Object.entries({ ...oldUser, ...user, userId })) {
    if (k === "userId") continue;
    if (typeof v === "string" && normalizeValue(v)) {
      atomic.set(indexKey(k, v, userId), true);
    }
  }

  const result = await atomic.commit();
  if (!result.ok) throw new Error("failed to write user");
  return { ...oldUser, ...user, userId };
}

async function getUser(userId: string) {
  const res = await kv.get<UserRecord>(userKey(userId));
  return res.value;
}

async function deleteUser(userId: string) {
  const existing = await kv.get<UserRecord>(userKey(userId));
  if (!existing.value) return false;

  const atomic = kv.atomic();
  atomic.delete(userKey(userId));

  for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(existing.value)) {
    if (k === "userId") continue;
    if (typeof v === "string" && normalizeValue(v)) {
      atomic.delete(indexKey(k, v, userId));
    }
  }

  const result = await atomic.commit();
  return result.ok;
}

async function searchUsers(searchParams: URLSearchParams) {
  const filters = getFilterEntries(searchParams);
  const limit = parseLimit(searchParams.get("limit"));
  const offset = parseOffset(searchParams.get("offset"));

  if (filters.length === 0) {
    const users: UserRecord[] = [];
    let skipped = 0;
    for await (const entry of kv.list<UserRecord>({ prefix: ["users"] })) {
      const key = entry.key;
      if (
        Array.isArray(key) &&
        key.length === 2 &&
        key[0] === "users" &&
        typeof key[1] === "string"
      ) {
        if (skipped < offset) {
          skipped++;
          continue;
        }
        users.push(entry.value);
        if (users.length >= limit) break;
      }
    }
    return { users, count: users.length, filters: {} };
  }

  const [primaryFilterParam, primaryFilterValue] = filters[0];
  const matchedIds: string[] = [];

  for await (
    const entry of kv.list<boolean>({
      prefix: ["users", "by_filter", primaryFilterParam, primaryFilterValue],
    })
  ) {
    const key = entry.key;
    const userId = typeof key[key.length - 1] === "string"
      ? String(key[key.length - 1])
      : null;
    if (userId) matchedIds.push(userId);
  }

  const remainingFilters = filters.slice(1);
  const users: UserRecord[] = [];
  let skipped = 0;

  for (const userId of matchedIds) {
    const user = await getUser(userId);
    if (!user) continue;

    let ok = true;
    for (const [param, value] of remainingFilters) {
      if (String(user[param] ?? "") !== value) {
        ok = false;
        break;
      }
    }

    if (!ok) continue;
    if (skipped < offset) {
      skipped++;
      continue;
    }

    users.push(user);
    if (users.length >= limit) break;
  }

  return {
    users,
    count: users.length,
    filters: Object.fromEntries(filters),
  };
}

serve(async (req) => {
  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const pathname = url.pathname;

  try {
    if (req.method === "POST" && pathname === "/users") {
      const body = await req.json();
      const user = await putUser(body as UserRecord);
      return json({ ok: true, user }, { status: 201 });
    }

    if (req.method === "GET" && pathname === "/users/search") {
      const result = await searchUsers(url.searchParams);
      return json(result);
    }

    if (pathname.startsWith("/users/")) {
      const userId = normalizeValue(pathname.split("/")[2]);
      if (!userId) return badRequest("invalid userId");

      if (req.method === "GET") {
        const user = await getUser(userId);
        if (!user) return json({ error: "not found" }, { status: 404 });
        return json(user);
      }

      if (req.method === "DELETE") {
        const ok = await deleteUser(userId);
        if (!ok) return json({ error: "not found" }, { status: 404 });
        return json({ ok: true });
      }

      if (req.method === "PUT" || req.method === "PATCH") {
        const body = await req.json();
        const user = await putUser({ ...(body as UserRecord), userId });
        return json({ ok: true, user });
      }
    }

    return json({ error: "not found" }, { status: 404 });
  } catch (error) {
    return json(
      { error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : "internal error" },
      { status: 500 },
    );
  }
});
